title: New f37 flake: podman image prune: APK error or timeout
body:
Seems to be timing out and failing in an apk command:
```
podman [options] build --pull-never --layers=true --file /tmp/podman_test3730377924/Dockerfile -t alpine_bash:latest /tmp/podman_test3730377924
         STEP 1/4: FROM quay.io/libpod/alpine:latest
         STEP 2/4: LABEL RUN podman --version
         --> 033b2b638ee
         STEP 3/4: RUN apk update
         fetch http://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/v3.10/main/x86_64/APKINDEX.tar.gz
```
Lots of f37 flakes, none on f36.

### Podman prune [It] podman image prune - remove only dangling images 
* fedora-37 : int podman fedora-37 root container
  * PR #16389
    * [11-02 18:58](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6370124769263616/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-container.log.html#t--podman-image-prune---remove-only-dangling-images--1)
    * [11-02 18:58](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6370124769263616/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-container.log.html#t--podman-image-prune---remove-only-dangling-images--2)

    * [11-02 18:21](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5355295198150656/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-container.log.html#t--podman-image-prune---remove-only-dangling-images--1)
    * [11-02 18:21](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5355295198150656/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-container.log.html#t--podman-image-prune---remove-only-dangling-images--2)
* fedora-37 : int podman fedora-37 root host
  * PR #15760
    * [11-02 14:33](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6050840522784768/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-host.log.html#t--podman-image-prune---remove-only-dangling-images--1)
    * [11-02 14:33](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6050840522784768/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-host.log.html#t--podman-image-prune---remove-only-dangling-images--2)

comments.body:
I'm going to hazard a guess the these are the same problem (also apk related):

### Podman play kube with build [It] --build should override image in store 
* fedora-37 : int podman fedora-37 root container
  * PR #16389
    * [11-02 18:58](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6370124769263616/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-container.log.html#t----build-should-override-image-in-store--1)
    * [11-02 18:21](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5355295198150656/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-container.log.html#t----build-should-override-image-in-store--1)
    * [11-02 18:21](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5355295198150656/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-container.log.html#t----build-should-override-image-in-store--2)
    * [11-02 18:21](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5355295198150656/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-container.log.html#t----build-should-override-image-in-store--3)
* fedora-37 : int podman fedora-37 root host
  * PR #15760
    * [11-02 14:33](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6050840522784768/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-host.log.html#t----build-should-override-image-in-store--1)
Why do they run apk at all? This is just asking for flakes and adds unnecessary runtime.
